title: NiSource (NI) Up 7.8% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: NiSource (NI) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: NiSource (NI) to Revise Rates for Upgrading Infrastructure
text: NiSource's (NI) unit, Columbia Gas, is likely to recoup investments made for the maintenance of infrastructure through rate filing. The funds generated from new rates will be utilized in ongoing projects.

title: NiSource: A Lot To Like With This Attractively-Priced Natural Gas Utility
text: NiSource is one of the largest natural gas utilities in the United States, although the company also has an electric arm.

title: Spire: A Solid 4%-Yielding Utility, Albeit A Little Expensive
text: Spire: A Solid 4%-Yielding Utility, Albeit A Little Expensive

title: 17 Fair Priced 2022 Best Bet Dividends Beckon In March
text: Back in November-December 2021, Kiplinger and Barron's reporters combined to list ten sets of stocks sorted as best-bets for 2022. Those ten "Best-Bets" articles revealed 123 equities, with 88 paying dividends.
